rationale: Avoid the previously-failing upfront forall re-assertions. Instead, drive the proof directly via `assert forall|i| ... by { ... }`: case-split on i==index (where field-wise ensures pin every Page field through pre_self_) versus i!=index (where mentioning page_array@[i] triggers the ensures forall to equate each post's page with pre_self_'s). Then lift pointwise to sequence/Array =~=, and assert per-field equality of the non-array fields by transitivity through pre_self_.
